events.output: Approach formulated: 8 tasks across schema, server, workflow data, dead code, docs, tests. Execution order: T6 (cleanup) → T1→T2→T8 (foundation) → T3/T7 (adoption) → T4→T5 (protocols).
Created 06-work-package-plan.md: 8 tasks with files, details, acceptance criteria, estimates, dependencies, execution order, risk register.
Created 06-test-plan.md: 20 test cases across 6 areas (schema, regression, new behavior, dead code, TOON, meta skills).
Wrote two-paragraph solution overview to README.md under Solution Overview section.
No new assumptions identified — all planning decisions follow from confirmed approach and prior validated assumptions.
Feature branch bug/86-mandatory-phase-bypass is up to date with origin/main.
PR #87 description updated via GitHub API with planned changes, motivation, and submission checklist.
